objective: Prove complete operational dense tile accumulation and result stream equivalence.

decoder_contract.operational_dense_tile_equivalence_scope: Prove complete signed-int8 outer-product accumulation, final-beat inclusion, result ordering, clear/reuse, and ready/valid backpressure behavior against the reference GEMM.

evaluation_record.title: Operational dense-tile and score-SRAM cluster closure for Llama7B
evaluation_record.primary_question: How far do operational accumulator state, banked SRAM wiring, divider sharing, and local cluster routing move the measured Llama7B throughput, energy, and area frontier?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: Do not scale the narrow hash harness as an operational producer.
